nodes.label: Send Effects
nodes.detail: One or more SendEffect instances route audio into this container

nodes.label: Internal Buffer (Sum)
nodes.detail: Accumulates send signals additively from all connected SendEffects, with per-send gain and channel offset

nodes.label: Effect Chain
nodes.detail: MasterEffect-only FX chain processes the accumulated buffer monophonically

nodes.label: Routing Matrix
nodes.detail: Maps internal buffer channels to output channels via additive copy

nodes.label: Clear Buffer
nodes.detail: Internal buffer cleared after each render cycle
